This is the timing pattern of this account's recorded hits. Release and update spikes are included, so treat it as descriptive—not a general reader-habit clock or a causal recommendation.

Chart unavailable.

Descriptive only: publication order, premise, length, fandom activity and audience size all move together. Use the chart to form questions, not to assign a cause.

Chart unavailable.
Select at least one metric.
Scroll to zoom · drag to pan · double-click to reset Rolling ratios use trailing-24h counter changes; gaps mean no valid denominator. Ratios describe counter mix, not unique readers or quality.

Balanced performance checkpoints

BPI balances fixed-age attention and endorsement. A score of 100 is the median eligible one-shot at that checkpoint.

Chart unavailable.

BPI = 100 × √(hit index × kudos index). It rewards additional attention without calling every extra hit a reread. Approximate publication anchors remain approximate, and scores can move when another eligible work matures into the shared baseline.

Market data is not available in this build. Check Data & Health for the source status.

Current listing-date cohorts

Bars group today's catalog snapshot by AO3 listing date, which can reflect either publication or an update. Hits and kudos are current lifetime totals for works in each cohort—not engagement earned during that month.

Chart unavailable.

Descriptive one-shot associations

Recent listing activity

Supply, demand proxy and competition

Work share is a competition/supply measure; share of kudos is an observed demand proxy. Above the diagonal means engagement share exceeds representation, not that the tag caused the result.

Eastern time. Raw source files retain full history; the browser payload is bounded and may downsample older chart points.
